detail: Mahanoy v. B.L. (2021) topic brief; 'hidden system' angle = where school authority ends online; score 88/100; R2. Opens the 'what you can SAY' cluster (after EP6-10 see/take arc). Owner-delegated topic selection (EP10-15).
